'''''Atron's Mistress''''' was a custom [[Zuraco Cargo Hauler]] owned by the [[Karazak Slavers' Cooperative/Legends|Karazak Slavers Cooperative]] and used to transport [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The ship was commandeered by the [[Red Moons]] while on [[Gabredor III/Legends|Gabredor III]] after destroying the Karazak base there and freeing the slaves.

{{Ship-stub}}
